title: bupleurum junceum subsp. affine
intro: Bupleurum junceum subsp. affine, also known as Chinese thick-spiked hare's ear, is a plant species within the genus Bupleurum, which is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Bupleurum junceum subsp. affine include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
